meaning: n.鼓手,<美> 旅行推销员
examples: He was a drummer in a rock band.
The band's drummer is the brains behind their latest venture.
He was a carpenter and talented drummer.
Drummer John Densmore paid tribute to Manzarek, saying he felt "totally in sync" with his "musical brother".
Husband and former Divinyls drummer Charley Drayton said the singer died after battling breast cancer and multiple sclerosis.
